case_title: SEK WONG et al VS. KAREN BETH AIKEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, SEK WONG, GARRETT AS TO DEFENDANT AIKEN, KAREN BETH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-09-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-06-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-28-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-09-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DAVID W. WASHINGTON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
